commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e94ac92c838977f6d009a417666a703d5ff3e4de)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an agent-side external-action evidence contract and SMS receipt-claim guard across streaming, block, and terminal outputs, with plugin metadata support and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +570, Tests +726. Total +1296 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, not live-reproduced: the diff globally enforces receipt guarding while its evidence collector returns no evidence for tools without plugin metadata, and current main's built-in SMS message path returns receipt data through the message tool.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer or contributor needs to fix the built-in message-tool receipt gap and supply real behavior proof; automation should not mark this external PR merge-ready from synthetic proof alone.

target.title: fix(agents): require evidence for SMS receipt claims
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds plugin-declared external action evidence metadata for tool results, initially used for SMS delivery receipts.
- Records successful current-run external action evidence and carries it through retries, terminal payload construction, partial replies, block replies, and chunked block delivery.
- Replaces unsupported SMS receipt claims with a verification error when there is no matching current-run delivery evidence.
- Adds focused regression coverage for matching evidence, dry-run exclusion, spoofed plugin metadata, streamed replies, chunked block replies, long answers, non-SMS receipt false positives, and reply routing preservation.

## Linked context
- No exact existing issue or PR found for `SMS receipt evidence Dialpad Message ID` before opening this PR.
- Related but not duplicate: #90998 covers SMS text command auth, not receipt evidence.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
- Behavior or issue addressed: an agent could claim an SMS was sent and cite provider-like details such as `Status: accepted/queued` and `Message ID` even when the current run had no matching successful SMS tool result evidence.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout rebased onto upstream `origin/main` at `3c9cf2d5833d106713c640f806a1eb35827f3e0c`, commit `e94ac92c838977f6d009a417666a703d5ff3e4de`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
timeout -k5s 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs \
  src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts \
  src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts \
  src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts \
  src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts
```

- Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  83 passed (83)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  64 passed (64)
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  81 passed (81)
[test] passed 3 Vitest shards in 15.60s

unsupported= {"allowed":false,"claim":{"actionFamily":"sms","recipient":"+13522815065","sender":"+14155201316","providerId":"4797682962735104","status":"accepted/queued"},"replacementText":"I cannot verify that this SMS was sent. I do not have matching current-turn delivery evidence, so please check the messaging provider history or use the verified send flow before reporting it as sent."}
verified= {"allowed":true}
nonSms= {"allowed":true}
```

- Observed result after fix: unsupported SMS receipt text is replaced before terminal payload delivery, partial streaming, streamed block replies, and chunked block replies. Matching current-run evidence allows the receipt. Non-SMS receipts are not classified as SMS.
- What was not tested: a live Dialpad provider send against production credentials was not performed in upstream proof. This PR proves the OpenClaw runtime invariant with focused local tests and direct guard execution.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: proof uses synthetic tool-result evidence shaped like provider output, not a real provider API response.
- Before evidence: the regression was observed in a live operator workflow where the UI did not show the SMS and local history did not contain the claimed message ID after the agent reported it as sent.

## Tests and validation
- `timeout -k5s 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts`
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD -- .`
- `timeout -k5s 900s codex review --base origin/main`: final review reported no discrete, actionable regressions before the final upstream rebase. Rebase onto latest upstream was clean and focused tests were rerun afterward.

## Risk checklist
- [x] Plugin metadata is owner-scoped by plugin ID plus tool name, so another plugin cannot spoof evidence metadata for a same-named tool.
- [x] Dry-run and failed results are not recorded as successful evidence.
- [x] Current-run evidence is accumulated across retry attempts.
- [x] Streamed partial replies, block replies, chunked block replies, and terminal payloads enforce the same receipt invariant.
- [x] Reply routing metadata is preserved when replacing unsupported receipt text.
- [x] Non-SMS receipts and explanatory SMS documentation are not treated as sent SMS receipts.

## Current review state
- Local Codex review findings were addressed through multiple rounds.
- Final captured review before the final upstream rebase: no discrete, actionable regressions found.
- Branch was then rebased cleanly onto latest upstream `origin/main` and focused tests were rerun.

## Badge
[size/exempt: safety invariant spans plugin metadata contract, evidence collection, retry accumulation, streamed replies, chunked block replies, terminal payloads, and regression tests; splitting would leave a non-enforcing partial change.]

## AI Assistance
This PR was authored with Codex. Local Codex review was run and actionable findings were addressed. Testing depth is listed above.
